He pioneered the large-scale use of firearms, annihilating the Takeda cavalry with rotating volley fire at Nagashino. He abolished trade-impeding checkpoints and promoted free markets. In 1582, his general Akechi Mitsuhide rebelled; trapped at Honno-ji temple, Nobunaga perished in the flames — 'The enemy is at Honno-ji!' remains Japanese history's most famous lament.

name: 丰臣秀吉
summary: 日本战国时代的统一者，从最低层出身的农民之子到关白——掌握最高权力，实现了日本的统一。
summaryEn: The unifier of Japan's Warring States period, who rose from a peasant background to become Kampaku — the highest civil office — and unified Japan.
description: 秀吉出身贫寒，从织田信长的草履取（提鞋的小厮）做到了控制全日本的大名。信长死后他迅速行动，在山崎之战中击败明智光秀为旧主复仇。1590年他最终统一了日本全境。他推行太阁检地——详细丈量全国土地，奠定了幕藩体制的经济基础；颁布刀狩令收缴农民武器。但他晚年发动了两次入侵朝鲜的战争——虽以失败告终，却深刻影响了东亚格局。
descriptionEn: Born to a peasant family, Hideyoshi rose from being Nobunaga's sandal-bearer to the daimyo controlling all Japan. After Nobunaga's death, he moved swiftly, defeating Akechi Mitsuhide at Yamazaki to avenge his lord. By 1590 he had unified the entire country. He conducted the Taiko Land Survey — a comprehensive cadastral survey that laid the economic foundation for the bakuhan system — and issued the Sword Hunt edict to disarm the peasantry. In his final years, he launched two invasions of Korea; though ultimately unsuccessful, they profoundly impacted the East Asian order.

name: 清少纳言
summary: 日本平安时代的女作家，《枕草子》的作者，与紫式部并称平安文学双璧，以敏锐的观察和机智的笔触著称。
summaryEn: Heian-period Japanese court lady and author of 'The Pillow Book,' celebrated alongside Murasaki Shikibu as twin pillars of Heian literature, known for her keen observation and wit.
description: 清少纳言在一条天皇的中宫定子身边担任女官。她在日常宫廷生活中随手记下的随笔——《枕草子》——以独特的'事物清单'（如'令人心动的事''令人扫兴的事'）和对自然景物的诗意描写开创了日本随笔文学的先河。她与紫式部互为竞争对手——紫式部在日记中批评清少纳言'自以为是的女人'——但两人共同奠定了日本国风文学的基础。
descriptionEn: Sei Shonagon served as lady-in-waiting to Empress Teishi. The casual notes she jotted down about daily court life — 'The Pillow Book' — pioneered Japanese essay literature through unique 'lists of things' ('things that make the heart beat faster,' 'things that arouse a fond memory') and poetic descriptions of nature. She and Murasaki Shikibu were rivals — Murasaki criticized Sei in her diary as 'a woman who thinks too much of herself' — but together they laid the foundation of Japanese vernacular literature.

name: 广开土大王
summary: 高句丽第十九代君主，大幅扩张了高句丽的领土，其功业刻于著名的广开土大王碑上。
summaryEn: The 19th ruler of Goguryeo who greatly expanded the kingdom's territory, his achievements inscribed on the famous Gwanggaeto Stele.
description: 广开土大王（高谈德）18岁即位，在位的22年中将高句丽从一个地区强国扩张为东北亚最强大的国家。他南征百济和新罗，北击契丹和鲜卑，将疆域推进到了辽河流域和朝鲜半岛中南部。他去世后其子长寿王在今天的吉林省集安市立碑纪功——这块4米多高的石碑是研究古代东北亚历史最重要的文献之一。
descriptionEn: Gwanggaeto (Go Damdeok) ascended at 18; during his 22-year reign, he transformed Goguryeo from a regional power into Northeast Asia's most formidable state. He campaigned south against Baekje and Silla, and north against the Khitan and Xianbei, pushing Goguryeo's borders to the Liao River basin and the central-southern Korean Peninsula. After his death, his son King Jangsu erected a stele in modern Ji'an, Jilin Province — this 4-meter-tall monument is one of the most important documents for studying ancient Northeast Asian history.

name: 丁若镛
summary: 朝鲜后期实学派的集大成者，百科全书式的学者，试图用实用知识改革朝鲜社会。
summaryEn: The supreme synthesis of the late Joseon Silhak (Practical Learning) school, an encyclopedic scholar who sought to reform Korean society through practical knowledge.
description: 丁若镛（号茶山）早年因参与天主教活动而被流放18年。在流放期间他写下了500多卷著作，涵盖经学、政治、经济、法律、医学、建筑和农业。他批判僵化的性理学脱离实际，主张技术是'利国便民'的关键——他设计了水原城的起重机，撰写农业技术手册。他的思想虽然生前未能广泛实施，却成为了韩国现代化思维的先声。
descriptionEn: Jeong Yak-yong (pen name Dasan) was exiled for 18 years due to his involvement with Catholicism. During exile, he wrote over 500 volumes covering classics, politics, economics, law, medicine, architecture, and agriculture. He criticized ossified Neo-Confucianism for its detachment from reality and argued that technology was key to 'benefiting the nation and the people' — he designed the crane used to build Suwon Fortress and wrote agricultural manuals. Though his ideas were not widely implemented in his lifetime, they foreshadowed Korean modernization.

name: 古鲁那纳克
summary: 锡克教的创始人，教导世人超越印度教与伊斯兰教的对立，皈依唯一的无形之神。
summaryEn: Founder of Sikhism who taught humanity to transcend the Hindu-Muslim divide and devote themselves to the one formless God.
description: 那纳克生于印度旁遮普的印度教家庭，但在伊斯兰统治的环境中长大。30岁时他在一次神秘的濒死体验后宣称'没有印度教徒，也没有穆斯林——只有神才是真实的。'他此后的二十多年中游历了整个南亚和中东，教导人们一神信仰、人人平等和服务他人。他的教义被记录在锡克教圣书《古鲁·格兰特·萨希卜》中——这也使他成为极少数在世时就开始编纂自己宗教经典的创始人之一。
descriptionEn: Nanak was born to a Hindu family in Punjab but grew up under Islamic rule. At 30, after a mystical near-death experience, he proclaimed: 'There is no Hindu, there is no Muslim — only God is real.' He spent the next two decades traveling across South Asia and the Middle East, teaching monotheism, equality, and service to others. His teachings are recorded in the Sikh scripture Guru Granth Sahib — making him one of the very few founders who began compiling their religion's sacred text during their own lifetime.

name: 阿克巴大帝
summary: 莫卧儿帝国最伟大的皇帝（1556-1605年在位）。推行宗教宽容政策，废除对非穆斯林的人头税，建立了高效的行政体系，将帝国的版图和国力推向鼎盛。
summaryEn: The greatest Mughal emperor who created a unified empire bridging the Hindu-Muslim divide through religious tolerance and cultural synthesis.
description: 阿克巴13岁即位，但迅速证明了自己是军事和管理天才。他征服了印度次大陆的大部分地区，但真正的革命性在于他的治理理念：他废除了对非穆斯林征收的'吉兹亚'人头税，娶了印度教拉杰普特公主，邀请各宗教代表在宫廷讨论神学，甚至创建了一种综合各宗教的'神一教'。他推动波斯、印度和中亚文化的融合——莫卧儿细密画和建筑风格在他的时期达到巅峰。
descriptionEn: Akbar ascended at 13 but quickly proved a military and administrative genius. He conquered most of the Indian subcontinent, but his true revolutionary contribution lay in his governance philosophy: he abolished the jizya tax on non-Muslims, married Hindu Rajput princesses, invited representatives of all religions to debate theology at court, and even created a syncretic 'Divine Faith.' He fostered a fusion of Persian, Indian, and Central Asian cultures — Mughal miniature painting and architecture reached their zenith under his patronage.

name: 拉马努金
summary: 印度数学天才，几乎未受正规教育却独立发现了近4000个数学定理和公式，其笔记至今仍在被研究。
summaryEn: Indian mathematical genius who, with virtually no formal training, independently discovered nearly 4,000 theorems and formulas — his notebooks are still being studied today.
description: 拉马努金出身印度南部一个贫穷的婆罗门家庭，15岁时借到一本过时的数学手册后自学成才。1913年他写信给剑桥大学的哈代——后者立即意识到这个印度青年是一个'最高级别的数学家'。在剑桥的五年中他与哈代合作发表了大量开创性的论文。但他不适应英国的气候和饮食——1920年回到印度后不久便因营养不良和疾病去世，年仅32岁。他留下的未解公式激发了整整一个世纪的研究。
descriptionEn: Born to a poor Brahmin family in southern India, Ramanujan was self-taught from an outdated mathematics handbook borrowed at 15. In 1913 he wrote to Hardy at Cambridge — who instantly recognized the young Indian as a 'mathematician of the highest order.' During five years at Cambridge, he co-published groundbreaking papers with Hardy. But he couldn't adapt to the English climate or diet — he returned to India and died shortly after in 1920 at just 32, from malnutrition and illness. His unsolved formulas have inspired a century of research.

name: 伊本·赫勒敦
summary: 阿拉伯历史学家和社会学家，《历史绪论》的作者，被视为现代社会学、历史学和经济学的前驱。
summaryEn: Arab historian and sociologist, author of the 'Muqaddimah,' regarded as a precursor of modern sociology, historiography, and economics.
description: 伊本·赫勒敦出生在突尼斯，在动荡的政治生涯中先后为北非和安达卢西亚多个政权服务。他写作《历史绪论》的野心是创立一门全新的科学——他称之为'文明科学'——研究人类社会兴衰的规律。他提出了著名的'阿萨比亚'（群体凝聚力）理论：游牧部落因团结而崛起，在定居文明中逐渐腐化衰退。这一周期性的历史观领先于他同时代人几个世纪——汤因比称这部著作是'任何时代任何地方由任何头脑所产生的最伟大的历史哲学著作'。
descriptionEn: Born in Tunis, Ibn Khaldun served multiple North African and Andalusian regimes during a turbulent political career. His ambition in writing the 'Muqaddimah' was to found an entirely new science — what he called 'the science of civilization' — studying the laws of the rise and fall of human societies. He proposed the famous theory of 'asabiyyah' (group cohesion): nomadic tribes rise through solidarity, then gradually decay in settled civilization. This cyclical view of history was centuries ahead of its time — Toynbee called it 'the greatest work of its kind that has ever yet been created by any mind in any time or place.'

name: 德谟克利特
summary: 古希腊哲学家，原子论的创立者，提出万物由不可分割的原子组成。
summaryEn: Ancient Greek philosopher and founder of atomism, who proposed that all matter consists of indivisible atoms.
description: 德谟克利特提出了一种惊人的直觉：万物由在虚空中运动的不可分割的微小粒子——原子——组成。不同的原子形状和排列产生了不同的物质和感知。两千多年后，现代科学证实了他的原子论的核心洞见。他被称为'欢笑的哲学家'——因为他认为在原子和虚空的宇宙中，快乐是人生的最高目标。
descriptionEn: Democritus proposed an astonishing intuition: all things consist of indivisible tiny particles — atoms — moving through the void. Different atomic shapes and arrangements produce different substances and sensations. Over two millennia later, modern science confirmed the core insight of his atomism. He was called the 'laughing philosopher' — because in a universe of atoms and void, he held cheerfulness to be the highest goal of life.

name: 尼禄
summary: 罗马帝国第五位皇帝，以暴政和奢华著称，传说在罗马大火时弹琴作乐。
summaryEn: The fifth Roman emperor, notorious for tyranny and extravagance, legendarily 'fiddled while Rome burned.'
description: 尼禄17岁即位，早期在塞内卡等人的辅佐下治理尚可。但后来他处死了母亲阿格里皮娜和妻子，以残酷镇压反对者闻名。公元64年罗马大火——他嫁祸给基督徒进行了大规模迫害。他建造了奢华的'金宫'，其自我表演的欲望——参加奥运会的各种比赛——严重损害了皇帝尊严。68年军队叛乱，他自杀前说：'一个多么伟大的艺术家死去了！'
descriptionEn: Nero ascended at 17, and his early reign under Seneca's guidance was decent. But he later executed his mother Agrippina and his wife, and became known for brutal suppression of opponents. After Rome's great fire in 64 CE, he blamed and massively persecuted Christians. He built the extravagant 'Golden House'; his craving to perform — entering Olympic competitions — severely damaged imperial dignity. When the army rebelled in 68, he committed suicide, reportedly saying: 'What an artist dies in me!'

name: 孟德尔
summary: 奥地利修道士，遗传学之父，通过对豌豆的实验发现了遗传的基本规律。
summaryEn: Austrian monk and father of genetics who discovered the fundamental laws of inheritance through pea plant experiments.
description: 孟德尔在布尔诺修道院的花园中花了八年时间种植和杂交了两万八千多株豌豆。他系统地追踪了七种性状的遗传模式——发现了显性和隐性遗传、分离定律和自由组合定律。但他1866年发表的论文在当时几乎无人注意。直到1900年——他去世16年后——三位科学家独立重新发现了他的定律，他的天才才被世人所认识。
descriptionEn: Mendel spent eight years in the garden of his Brno monastery, growing and cross-breeding over 28,000 pea plants. He systematically tracked the inheritance patterns of seven traits — discovering dominant and recessive inheritance, the law of segregation, and the law of independent assortment. But his 1866 paper went virtually unnoticed. Only in 1900 — 16 years after his death — when three scientists independently rediscovered his laws, did the world recognize his genius.

name: 但丁
summary: 意大利诗人，《神曲》的作者，意大利语文学的奠基人，中世纪文学的巅峰。
summaryEn: Italian poet and author of 'The Divine Comedy,' founder of Italian vernacular literature and the summit of medieval literature.
description: 但丁因政治原因被家乡佛罗伦萨永久流放——正是在流放中他完成了人类文学史上最宏大的作品之一。《神曲》以第一人称叙述了穿越地狱、炼狱和天堂的旅程——维吉尔引领他穿过地狱和炼狱，贝雅特里齐引领他进入天堂。这部作品以严整的韵律结构和百科全书式的内容描绘了中世纪的世界观，同时为意大利语作为一种文学语言奠定了基础。
descriptionEn: Dante was permanently exiled from his native Florence for political reasons — it was in exile that he completed one of the most monumental works in literary history. 'The Divine Comedy' narrates in the first person a journey through Hell, Purgatory, and Paradise — Virgil guiding him through Hell and Purgatory, Beatrice through Paradise. The work, with its rigorous metrical structure and encyclopedic scope, captures the medieval worldview while establishing Italian as a literary language.

name: 第欧根尼
summary: 古希腊犬儒学派哲学家，以极端简朴的生活和对社会习俗的尖锐批判闻名。传说亚历山大大帝问他想要什么，他回答：'请别挡住我的阳光。'
summaryEn: Ancient Greek Cynic philosopher known for extreme simplicity and sharp critique of social conventions. When Alexander the Great asked what he wanted, he replied: 'Stand out of my sunlight.'
description: 古希腊犬儒学派哲学家，以极端简朴的生活和对社会习俗的尖锐批判闻名。传说亚历山大大帝问他想要什么，他回答：'请别挡住我的阳光。'
descriptionEn: Ancient Greek Cynic philosopher known for extreme simplicity and sharp critique of social conventions. When Alexander the Great asked what he wanted, he replied: 'Stand out of my sunlight.'

name: 亚历山大大帝
summary: 马其顿国王（前336-前323年在位），亚里士多德的学生。十年间率军征服波斯帝国、埃及至印度河流域，建立横跨欧亚非的庞大帝国，促进了希腊文化与东方文明的融合（希腊化时代）。
summaryEn: King of Macedon and one of the greatest conquerors of antiquity, who built a vast empire spanning three continents in just thirteen years. Tutored by Aristotle, he never lost a battle.
description: 马其顿国王，古代世界最伟大的征服者之一，在13年间建立了横跨欧亚非三大洲的庞大帝国。
descriptionEn: King of Macedon and one of the greatest conquerors of antiquity, who built a vast empire spanning three continents in just thirteen years. Tutored by Aristotle, he never lost a battle.

name: 老普林尼
summary: 古罗马作家和自然学家，《自然史》的作者——一部包罗万象的古代知识百科全书。在维苏威火山爆发时因近距离观察而遇难。
summaryEn: Roman author and naturalist who wrote the 'Natural History' — an encyclopedic compendium of ancient knowledge. He died during the eruption of Mount Vesuvius while trying to observe it up close.
description: 古罗马作家和自然学家，《自然史》的作者——一部包罗万象的古代知识百科全书。在维苏威火山爆发时因近距离观察而遇难。
descriptionEn: Roman author and naturalist who wrote the 'Natural History' — an encyclopedic compendium of ancient knowledge. He died during the eruption of Mount Vesuvius while trying to observe it up close.

name: 阿尔弗雷德大帝
summary: 威塞克斯国王，唯一被称为'大帝'的英格兰君主，抗击维京入侵，奠定英格兰统一的基础。
summaryEn: King of Wessex and the only English monarch called 'the Great,' who defended against Viking invasions and laid the foundation for a unified England.
description: 威塞克斯国王，唯一被称为'大帝'的英格兰君主，抗击维京入侵，奠定英格兰统一的基础。
descriptionEn: King of Wessex and the only English monarch called 'the Great,' who defended against Viking invasions and laid the foundation for a unified England.

name: 坎特伯雷的安瑟伦
summary: 中世纪经院哲学家，'上帝存在的本体论证明'的提出者，'信仰寻求理解'是其核心信条。
summaryEn: Medieval scholastic philosopher who proposed the ontological argument for God's existence, with 'faith seeking understanding' as his core principle.
description: 中世纪经院哲学家，'上帝存在的本体论证明'的提出者，'信仰寻求理解'是其核心信条。
descriptionEn: Medieval scholastic philosopher who proposed the ontological argument for God's existence, with 'faith seeking understanding' as his core principle.

name: 彼得·阿伯拉尔
summary: 法国中世纪哲学家和神学家，以与爱洛伊丝的传奇爱情故事和逻辑学的贡献闻名。
summaryEn: French medieval philosopher and theologian, famous for his legendary love affair with Heloise and contributions to logic.
description: 法国中世纪哲学家和神学家，以与爱洛伊丝的传奇爱情故事和逻辑学的贡献闻名。
descriptionEn: French medieval philosopher and theologian, famous for his legendary love affair with Heloise and contributions to logic.

name: 熙德
summary: 西班牙民族英雄，在收复运动中既是基督徒又是穆斯林的军事领袖，其传奇被谱写成史诗《熙德之歌》。
summaryEn: Spanish national hero who fought for both Christian and Muslim rulers during the Reconquista, immortalized in the epic 'Cantar de mio Cid.'
description: 西班牙民族英雄，在收复运动中既是基督徒又是穆斯林的军事领袖，其传奇被谱写成史诗《熙德之歌》。
descriptionEn: Spanish national hero who fought for both Christian and Muslim rulers during the Reconquista, immortalized in the epic 'Cantar de mio Cid.'

name: 霍布斯
summary: 英国政治哲学家，《利维坦》的作者，提出了社会契约论和自然状态下'所有人对所有人的战争'的观点。
summaryEn: English political philosopher and author of 'Leviathan,' who proposed social contract theory and the 'war of all against all' in the state of nature.
description: 英国政治哲学家，《利维坦》的作者，提出了社会契约论和自然状态下'所有人对所有人的战争'的观点。
descriptionEn: English political philosopher and author of 'Leviathan,' who proposed social contract theory and the 'war of all against all' in the state of nature.

name: 大卫·休谟
summary: 苏格兰哲学家和历史学家，经验主义和怀疑论的极致表达者，对因果关系的批判至今仍是哲学的核心课题。
summaryEn: Scottish philosopher and historian, the supreme expression of empiricism and skepticism, whose critique of causation remains a central philosophical problem.
description: 苏格兰哲学家和历史学家，经验主义和怀疑论的极致表达者，对因果关系的批判至今仍是哲学的核心课题。
descriptionEn: Scottish philosopher and historian, the supreme expression of empiricism and skepticism, whose critique of causation remains a central philosophical problem.

name: 亚当·斯密
summary: 苏格兰经济学家和哲学家，《国富论》的作者，现代经济学之父，'看不见的手'理论的提出者。
summaryEn: Scottish economist and philosopher, author of 'The Wealth of Nations' and father of modern economics, who proposed the 'invisible hand' theory.
description: 苏格兰经济学家和哲学家，《国富论》的作者，现代经济学之父，'看不见的手'理论的提出者。
descriptionEn: Scottish economist and philosopher, author of 'The Wealth of Nations' and father of modern economics, who proposed the 'invisible hand' theory.

name: 玛丽·沃斯通克拉夫特
summary: 英国作家和哲学家，《女权辩护》的作者，现代女性主义运动的先驱。
summaryEn: British writer and philosopher, author of 'A Vindication of the Rights of Woman,' and a pioneer of modern feminism.
description: 英国作家和哲学家，《女权辩护》的作者，现代女性主义运动的先驱。
descriptionEn: British writer and philosopher, author of 'A Vindication of the Rights of Woman,' and a pioneer of modern feminism.

name: 西蒙·玻利瓦尔
summary: 拉丁美洲独立运动领袖，被誉为"解放者"。领导了委内瑞拉、哥伦比亚、厄瓜多尔、秘鲁和玻利维亚等国摆脱西班牙殖民统治的独立战争。
summaryEn: Military and political leader of South American independence, who liberated Venezuela, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Bolivia.
description: 南美独立运动的军事和政治领袖，领导了委内瑞拉、哥伦比亚、厄瓜多尔、秘鲁和玻利维亚的独立。
descriptionEn: Military and political leader of South American independence, who liberated Venezuela, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Bolivia.

name: 奥斯卡·王尔德
summary: 爱尔兰作家和诗人，《道林·格雷的画像》的作者，以机智、唯美主义和悲剧性的人生命运著称。
summaryEn: Irish writer and poet, author of 'The Picture of Dorian Gray,' celebrated for his wit, aestheticism, and tragic personal fate.
description: 爱尔兰作家和诗人，《道林·格雷的画像》的作者，以机智、唯美主义和悲剧性的人生命运著称。
descriptionEn: Irish writer and poet, author of 'The Picture of Dorian Gray,' celebrated for his wit, aestheticism, and tragic personal fate.

name: 尼采
summary: 德国哲学家，'上帝已死'和超人哲学的提出者，以前所未有的激烈方式批判了西方传统道德和宗教。
summaryEn: German philosopher who proclaimed 'God is dead' and the Ubermensch, critiquing Western morality and religion with unprecedented intensity.
description: 德国哲学家，'上帝已死'和超人哲学的提出者，以前所未有的激烈方式批判了西方传统道德和宗教。
descriptionEn: German philosopher who proclaimed 'God is dead' and the Ubermensch, critiquing Western morality and religion with unprecedented intensity.

name: 弗洛伊德
summary: 奥地利神经学家，精神分析学的创始人，提出了无意识、本我自我超我、俄狄浦斯情结等概念。
summaryEn: Austrian neurologist and founder of psychoanalysis, who developed concepts of the unconscious, id-ego-superego, and the Oedipus complex.
description: 奥地利神经学家，精神分析学的创始人，提出了无意识、本我自我超我、俄狄浦斯情结等概念。
descriptionEn: Austrian neurologist and founder of psychoanalysis, who developed concepts of the unconscious, id-ego-superego, and the Oedipus complex.

name: 荣格
summary: 瑞士心理学家，分析心理学的创始人，提出了集体无意识和原型理论。
summaryEn: Swiss psychiatrist and founder of analytical psychology, who proposed the collective unconscious and archetypes.
description: 瑞士心理学家，分析心理学的创始人，提出了集体无意识和原型理论。
descriptionEn: Swiss psychiatrist and founder of analytical psychology, who proposed the collective unconscious and archetypes.

name: 托马斯·爱迪生
summary: 美国发明家和企业家，拥有超过一千项专利，发明了实用电灯、留声机和电影摄影机。
summaryEn: American inventor and entrepreneur with over a thousand patents, who invented the practical light bulb, phonograph, and motion picture camera.
description: 美国发明家和企业家，拥有超过一千项专利，发明了实用电灯、留声机和电影摄影机。
descriptionEn: American inventor and entrepreneur with over a thousand patents, who invented the practical light bulb, phonograph, and motion picture camera.

name: 亚历山大·贝尔
summary: 苏格兰裔美国发明家，电话的发明者，同时致力于聋人教育和航空学研究。
summaryEn: Scottish-American inventor of the telephone, who also dedicated himself to deaf education and aviation research.
description: 苏格兰裔美国发明家，电话的发明者，同时致力于聋人教育和航空学研究。
descriptionEn: Scottish-American inventor of the telephone, who also dedicated himself to deaf education and aviation research.

name: 莱特兄弟
summary: 美国航空先驱，1903年成功完成了人类历史上首次受控的、持续的、重于空气的动力飞行。
summaryEn: American aviation pioneers who achieved the first controlled, sustained, powered heavier-than-air flight in 1903.
description: 美国航空先驱，1903年成功完成了人类历史上首次受控的、持续的、重于空气的动力飞行。
descriptionEn: American aviation pioneers who achieved the first controlled, sustained, powered heavier-than-air flight in 1903.

name: 马可尼
summary: 意大利发明家，无线电通信的先驱，1909年诺贝尔物理学奖得主。
summaryEn: Italian inventor and pioneer of radio communication, 1909 Nobel laureate in Physics.
description: 意大利发明家，无线电通信的先驱，1909年诺贝尔物理学奖得主。
descriptionEn: Italian inventor and pioneer of radio communication, 1909 Nobel laureate in Physics.

name: 亨利·福特
summary: 美国实业家，福特汽车公司的创始人，以流水线生产方式和T型车革命性地改变了现代工业。
summaryEn: American industrialist and founder of Ford Motor Company, who revolutionized modern industry with the assembly line and Model T.
description: 美国实业家，福特汽车公司的创始人，以流水线生产方式和T型车革命性地改变了现代工业。
descriptionEn: American industrialist and founder of Ford Motor Company, who revolutionized modern industry with the assembly line and Model T.

name: 阿尔弗雷德·诺贝尔
summary: 瑞典化学家和发明家，炸药的发明者，以其遗产设立了诺贝尔奖。
summaryEn: Swedish chemist and inventor of dynamite, who established the Nobel Prizes with his fortune.
description: 瑞典化学家和发明家，炸药的发明者，以其遗产设立了诺贝尔奖。
descriptionEn: Swedish chemist and inventor of dynamite, who established the Nobel Prizes with his fortune.

name: 罗斯福
summary: 美国第32任总统，唯一连任四届的总统，领导美国度过大萧条和二战，实施了新政和《租借法案》。
summaryEn: The 32nd US President and the only one elected to four terms, who led America through the Great Depression and WWII, implementing the New Deal and Lend-Lease.
description: 美国第32任总统，唯一连任四届的总统，领导美国度过大萧条和二战，实施了新政和《租借法案》。
descriptionEn: The 32nd US President and the only one elected to four terms, who led America through the Great Depression and WWII, implementing the New Deal and Lend-Lease.

name: 杜鲁门
summary: 美国第33任总统，决定使用原子弹结束二战，推行马歇尔计划和杜鲁门主义，奠定冷战遏制战略。
summaryEn: The 33rd US President who decided to use atomic bombs to end WWII and established the Marshall Plan and Truman Doctrine, defining Cold War containment strategy.
description: 美国第33任总统，决定使用原子弹结束二战，推行马歇尔计划和杜鲁门主义，奠定冷战遏制战略。
descriptionEn: The 33rd US President who decided to use atomic bombs to end WWII and established the Marshall Plan and Truman Doctrine, defining Cold War containment strategy.

name: 肯尼迪
summary: 美国第35任总统，以阿波罗登月计划和古巴导弹危机的处理而著称，在任内遇刺身亡。
summaryEn: The 35th US President known for the Apollo moon landing program and handling of the Cuban Missile Crisis, assassinated in office.
description: 美国第35任总统，以阿波罗登月计划和古巴导弹危机的处理而著称，在任内遇刺身亡。
descriptionEn: The 35th US President known for the Apollo moon landing program and handling of the Cuban Missile Crisis, assassinated in office.

name: 马丁·路德·金
summary: 美国民权运动领袖，'我有一个梦想'的演讲者，以非暴力方式为种族平等而奋斗，诺贝尔和平奖得主。
summaryEn: American civil rights leader and orator of 'I Have a Dream,' who fought for racial equality through nonviolent resistance, Nobel Peace Prize laureate.
description: 美国民权运动领袖，'我有一个梦想'的演讲者，以非暴力方式为种族平等而奋斗，诺贝尔和平奖得主。
descriptionEn: American civil rights leader and orator of 'I Have a Dream,' who fought for racial equality through nonviolent resistance, Nobel Peace Prize laureate.

name: 莫罕达斯·甘地
summary: 印度民族独立运动领袖，以非暴力不合作的方式领导印度摆脱英国殖民统治，被尊为'圣雄'。
summaryEn: Leader of India's independence movement who guided the nation to freedom from British rule through nonviolent civil disobedience, revered as 'Mahatma' (Great Soul).
description: 印度民族独立运动领袖，以非暴力不合作的方式领导印度摆脱英国殖民统治，被尊为'圣雄'。
descriptionEn: Leader of India's independence movement who guided the nation to freedom from British rule through nonviolent civil disobedience, revered as 'Mahatma' (Great Soul).

name: 撒切尔夫人
summary: 英国首位女首相，以坚定的自由市场改革和马岛战争的胜利著称，'铁娘子'的称号来自苏联媒体。
summaryEn: Britain's first female Prime Minister, known for her steadfast free-market reforms and the Falklands War victory; 'Iron Lady' was coined by Soviet media.
description: 英国首位女首相，以坚定的自由市场改革和马岛战争的胜利著称，'铁娘子'的称号来自苏联媒体。
descriptionEn: Britain's first female Prime Minister, known for her steadfast free-market reforms and the Falklands War victory; 'Iron Lady' was coined by Soviet media.

name: 戴高乐
summary: 法国将军和政治家，二战中领导自由法国运动，战后创建法兰西第五共和国并担任首任总统。
summaryEn: French general and statesman who led the Free French movement during WWII and founded the Fifth Republic as its first President.
description: 法国将军和政治家，二战中领导自由法国运动，战后创建法兰西第五共和国并担任首任总统。
descriptionEn: French general and statesman who led the Free French movement during WWII and founded the Fifth Republic as its first President.

name: 阿登纳
summary: 西德首任总理，领导战后德国的经济奇迹和民主重建，推动了法德和解和欧洲一体化。
summaryEn: First Chancellor of West Germany who led postwar economic miracle and democratic reconstruction, advancing Franco-German reconciliation and European integration.
description: 西德首任总理，领导战后德国的经济奇迹和民主重建，推动了法德和解和欧洲一体化。
descriptionEn: First Chancellor of West Germany who led postwar economic miracle and democratic reconstruction, advancing Franco-German reconciliation and European integration.

name: 霍布斯鲍姆
summary: 英国马克思主义历史学家，《革命的年代》《资本的年代》《帝国的年代》《极端的年代》的作者。
summaryEn: British Marxist historian and author of the 'Age of' tetralogy: Revolution, Capital, Empire, and Extremes.
description: 英国马克思主义历史学家，《革命的年代》《资本的年代》《帝国的年代》《极端的年代》的作者。
descriptionEn: British Marxist historian and author of the 'Age of' tetralogy: Revolution, Capital, Empire, and Extremes.

name: 福柯
summary: 法国哲学家和思想史家，以对权力、知识、监狱和性史的研究深刻影响了后现代思想。
summaryEn: French philosopher and historian of ideas whose studies of power, knowledge, prisons, and sexuality profoundly influenced postmodern thought.
description: 法国哲学家和思想史家，以对权力、知识、监狱和性史的研究深刻影响了后现代思想。
descriptionEn: French philosopher and historian of ideas whose studies of power, knowledge, prisons, and sexuality profoundly influenced postmodern thought.

name: 汉娜·阿伦特
summary: 德裔美国政治哲学家，《极权主义的起源》的作者，以'平庸之恶'的概念分析了纳粹大屠杀。
summaryEn: German-American political philosopher and author of 'The Origins of Totalitarianism,' who analyzed the Nazi Holocaust through the concept of the 'banality of evil.'
description: 德裔美国政治哲学家，《极权主义的起源》的作者，以'平庸之恶'的概念分析了纳粹大屠杀。
descriptionEn: German-American political philosopher and author of 'The Origins of Totalitarianism,' who analyzed the Nazi Holocaust through the concept of the 'banality of evil.'

name: 达芬奇
summary: 意大利文艺复兴博学家，'文艺复兴人'的典范，《蒙娜丽莎》和《最后的晚餐》的创作者，同时是杰出的科学家和发明家。
summaryEn: Italian Renaissance polymath and the quintessential 'Renaissance man,' creator of the 'Mona Lisa' and 'The Last Supper,' as well as a brilliant scientist and inventor.
description: 意大利文艺复兴博学家，'文艺复兴人'的典范，《蒙娜丽莎》和《最后的晚餐》的创作者，同时是杰出的科学家和发明家。
descriptionEn: Italian Renaissance polymath and the quintessential 'Renaissance man,' creator of the 'Mona Lisa' and 'The Last Supper,' as well as a brilliant scientist and inventor.

name: 勃拉姆斯
summary: 德国作曲家，与巴赫和贝多芬并称'3B'，其交响曲将古典形式与浪漫精神完美结合。
summaryEn: German composer, celebrated alongside Bach and Beethoven as one of the 'Three Bs,' whose symphonies perfectly fused classical form with Romantic spirit.
description: 德国作曲家，与巴赫和贝多芬并称'3B'，其交响曲将古典形式与浪漫精神完美结合。
descriptionEn: German composer, celebrated alongside Bach and Beethoven as one of the 'Three Bs,' whose symphonies perfectly fused classical form with Romantic spirit.

name: 柴可夫斯基
summary: 俄罗斯作曲家，以《天鹅湖》《胡桃夹子》和《1812序曲》等充满俄罗斯灵魂的旋律闻名于世。
summaryEn: Russian composer celebrated worldwide for his Russian-souled melodies in 'Swan Lake,' 'The Nutcracker,' and the '1812 Overture.'
description: 俄罗斯作曲家，以《天鹅湖》《胡桃夹子》和《1812序曲》等充满俄罗斯灵魂的旋律闻名于世。
descriptionEn: Russian composer celebrated worldwide for his Russian-souled melodies in 'Swan Lake,' 'The Nutcracker,' and the '1812 Overture.'

name: 梵高
summary: 荷兰后印象派画家，以强烈的色彩和表现性的笔触著称，生前只卖出一幅画，死后成为最著名的艺术家之一。
summaryEn: Dutch Post-Impressionist painter known for vivid colors and expressive brushwork, who sold only one painting in his lifetime but became one of the most celebrated artists.
description: 荷兰后印象派画家，以强烈的色彩和表现性的笔触著称，生前只卖出一幅画，死后成为最著名的艺术家之一。
descriptionEn: Dutch Post-Impressionist painter known for vivid colors and expressive brushwork, who sold only one painting in his lifetime but became one of the most celebrated artists.

name: 莫奈
summary: 法国印象派创始人之一和最重要的实践者，'印象派'之名即来自他的画作《日出印象》。
summaryEn: One of the founders and the foremost practitioner of French Impressionism, whose painting 'Impression, Sunrise' gave the movement its name.
description: 法国印象派创始人之一和最重要的实践者，'印象派'之名即来自他的画作《日出印象》。
descriptionEn: One of the founders and the foremost practitioner of French Impressionism, whose painting 'Impression, Sunrise' gave the movement its name.

name: 张大千
summary: 中国画大师，以泼墨泼彩技法和对敦煌壁画的研究而闻名，20世纪最重要的中国画家之一。
summaryEn: Master of Chinese painting known for his splashed-ink color technique and study of Dunhuang murals, one of the 20th century's most important Chinese painters.
description: 中国画大师，以泼墨泼彩技法和对敦煌壁画的研究而闻名，20世纪最重要的中国画家之一。
descriptionEn: Master of Chinese painting known for his splashed-ink color technique and study of Dunhuang murals, one of the 20th century's most important Chinese painters.

name: 齐白石
summary: 中国画大师，以花鸟虫鱼的写意画著称，以'妙在似与不似之间'的艺术哲学闻名。
summaryEn: Master of Chinese painting celebrated for his freehand flowers, birds, insects, and fish, guided by the philosophy of 'wonder lies between likeness and unlikeness.'
description: 中国画大师，以花鸟虫鱼的写意画著称，以'妙在似与不似之间'的艺术哲学闻名。
descriptionEn: Master of Chinese painting celebrated for his freehand flowers, birds, insects, and fish, guided by the philosophy of 'wonder lies between likeness and unlikeness.'

name: 徐悲鸿
summary: 中国现代美术教育的奠基人，以骏马画闻名，将西方写实技法融入中国传统绘画。
summaryEn: Founder of modern Chinese art education, celebrated for his horse paintings, who integrated Western realist techniques into traditional Chinese painting.
description: 中国现代美术教育的奠基人，以骏马画闻名，将西方写实技法融入中国传统绘画。

name: 郎世宁
summary: 意大利耶稣会传教士画家，在清朝宫廷服务五十余年，将西方透视法与中国工笔技法完美融合。
summaryEn: Italian Jesuit missionary painter who served the Qing court for over 50 years, masterfully blending Western perspective with Chinese gongbi technique.
description: 意大利耶稣会传教士画家，在清朝宫廷服务五十余年，将西方透视法与中国工笔技法完美融合。
descriptionEn: Italian Jesuit missionary painter who served the Qing court for over 50 years, masterfully blending Western perspective with Chinese gongbi technique.

name: 鉴真
summary: 唐代高僧，日本律宗初祖。历经六次东渡终于抵达日本，尽管第五次时已双目失明。将佛教戒律、唐式建筑雕塑和医药技术传入日本，被尊为"过海大师"。
summaryEn: Tang Dynasty monk who attempted the sea crossing to Japan six times to transmit Buddhist precepts, succeeding even after losing eyesight, profoundly influencing Japanese Buddhism and culture.
description: 唐代高僧，六次东渡日本传播佛教戒律，双目失明后仍成功抵达，对日本佛教和文化产生深远影响。
descriptionEn: Tang Dynasty monk who attempted the sea crossing to Japan six times to transmit Buddhist precepts, succeeding even after losing eyesight, profoundly influencing Japanese Buddhism and culture.

name: 一休宗纯
summary: 日本禅宗僧人和诗人，以机智幽默和反传统的精神著称，后水尾天皇的私生子。
summaryEn: Japanese Zen monk and poet known for his wit, humor, and iconoclastic spirit, the illegitimate son of Emperor Go-Komatsu.
description: 日本禅宗僧人和诗人，以机智幽默和反传统的精神著称，后水尾天皇的私生子。
descriptionEn: Japanese Zen monk and poet known for his wit, humor, and iconoclastic spirit, the illegitimate son of Emperor Go-Komatsu.

name: 松尾芭蕉

summaryEn: Edo-period haiku master who elevated haiku from comic verse to high literature, celebrated for travel journals like 'The Narrow Road to the Deep North.'
description: 日本江户时代俳句大师，将俳句从滑稽诗体提升为高雅文学，以《奥之细道》等旅行纪行闻名。
descriptionEn: Edo-period haiku master who elevated haiku from comic verse to high literature, celebrated for travel journals like 'The Narrow Road to the Deep North.'

name: 樋口一叶
summary: 日本明治时代女作家，以描绘底层女性生活的短篇小说著称，24岁时因肺结核去世。
summaryEn: Meiji-era Japanese woman writer celebrated for short stories depicting the lives of impoverished women, died of tuberculosis at 24.
description: 日本明治时代女作家，以描绘底层女性生活的短篇小说著称，24岁时因肺结核去世。

summaryEn: English author of 'The Moon and Sixpence' and 'Of Human Bondage,' celebrated for his cool narrative style and insight into human nature.

summaryEn: Mughal emperor who built the Taj Mahal in memory of his wife Mumtaz Mahal — one of the New Seven Wonders of the World.

summaryEn: The last great Mughal emperor who expanded the empire to its greatest extent, but whose religious intolerance sowed the seeds of imperial decline.

summaryEn: Ottoman sultan who conquered the thousand-year-old city of Constantinople at just 21, inaugurating the Ottoman Empire's golden age.

summaryEn: Egyptian president and standard-bearer of Arab nationalism, who nationalized the Suez Canal and led the Pan-Arab movement.

descriptionEn: Egyptian president and standard-bearer of Arab nationalism, who nationalized the Suez Canal and led the Pan-Arab movement.

name: 肯雅塔
summary: 肯尼亚独立后的首任总统，被誉为'肯尼亚国父'。
summaryEn: Kenya's first president after independence, regarded as the 'Father of Kenya.'
description: 肯尼亚独立后的首任总统，被誉为'肯尼亚国父'。
descriptionEn: Kenya's first president after independence, regarded as the 'Father of Kenya.'

name: 汉尼拔
summary: 迦太基军事统帅，历史上最伟大的军事战略家之一，率军翻越阿尔卑斯山进攻罗马腹地。
summaryEn: Carthaginian general and one of history's greatest military strategists, who crossed the Alps to invade the Roman heartland.

description: 新西兰裔英国物理学家，'核物理学之父'，发现了原子核和质子，提出了放射性半衰期的概念。

name: 蒋介石

summaryEn: Leader of the Republic of China who unified China through the Northern Expedition, led China in the War of Resistance against Japan, and later retreated to Taiwan.
description: 中华民国军政领袖，北伐统一中国，领导中国抗日战争，后撤退台湾。

summaryEn: The first Premier of the People's Republic of China, celebrated for his diplomatic brilliance and tireless dedication.
description: 中华人民共和国首任总理，以卓越的外交才能和鞠躬尽瘁的工作精神著称。

name: 朴正熙

summaryEn: South Korean president who engineered the 'Miracle on the Han River' economic takeoff, though his authoritarian rule sparked controversy.
description: 韩国总统，推动'汉江奇迹'实现了韩国经济的腾飞，但独裁统治方式引发了争议。

summary: 韩国总统和民主运动领袖，以'阳光政策'推动韩朝和解，2000年获诺贝尔和平奖。
summaryEn: South Korean president and democracy activist who promoted inter-Korean reconciliation through the 'Sunshine Policy,' 2000 Nobel Peace Prize laureate.
description: 韩国总统和民主运动领袖，以'阳光政策'推动韩朝和解，2000年获诺贝尔和平奖。

summaryEn: Burmese democracy leader and daughter of General Aung San, Nobel Peace Prize laureate, placed under house arrest by the military junta for years.
description: 缅甸民主运动领袖，昂山将军之女，诺贝尔和平奖得主，长期被军政府软禁。
descriptionEn: Burmese democracy leader and daughter of General Aung San, Nobel Peace Prize laureate, placed under house arrest by the military junta for years.

name: 黎萨尔
summary: 菲律宾民族英雄和作家，其小说《不许犯我》和《起义者》唤醒了菲律宾的民族意识，被西班牙殖民当局处决。
summaryEn: Filipino national hero and writer whose novels 'Noli Me Tangere' and 'El Filibusterismo' awakened Philippine national consciousness, executed by Spanish colonial authorities.
description: 菲律宾民族英雄和作家，其小说《不许犯我》和《起义者》唤醒了菲律宾的民族意识，被西班牙殖民当局处决。

name: 弗里达
summary: 墨西哥画家和女性主义先驱，以其痛苦而有力的自画像和融合民间艺术的超现实主义风格闻名。
summaryEn: Mexican painter and feminist pioneer known for her painful yet powerful self-portraits blending folk art with surrealism.
description: 墨西哥画家和女性主义先驱，以其痛苦而有力的自画像和融合民间艺术的超现实主义风格闻名。

name: 切·格瓦拉
summary: 阿根廷裔古巴革命家，与卡斯特罗共同领导了古巴革命，后成为全球反叛和革命的文化象征。
summaryEn: Argentine-Cuban revolutionary who co-led the Cuban Revolution with Castro and became a global cultural icon of rebellion and revolution.
description: 阿根廷裔古巴革命家，与卡斯特罗共同领导了古巴革命，后成为全球反叛和革命的文化象征。
descriptionEn: Argentine-Cuban revolutionary who co-led the Cuban Revolution with Castro and became a global cultural icon of rebellion and revolution.

name: 萨尔瓦多·阿连德
summary: 智利总统，拉丁美洲首位通过民主选举上台的马克思主义领导人，在军事政变中殉职。
summaryEn: Chilean president and Latin America's first democratically elected Marxist leader, who died during the military coup.
description: 智利总统，拉丁美洲首位通过民主选举上台的马克思主义领导人，在军事政变中殉职。
descriptionEn: Chilean president and Latin America's first democratically elected Marxist leader, who died during the military coup.

name: 达尔文
summary: 英国博物学家，进化论的奠基人。乘坐贝格尔号环球考察五年，于1859年发表《物种起源》，提出自然选择学说，彻底改变了人类对生命起源和多样性的理解。
summaryEn: British naturalist who proposed the theory of evolution by natural selection, author of 'On the Origin of Species.'
description: 英国博物学家，以自然选择为核心的进化论的提出者，《物种起源》的作者。
descriptionEn: British naturalist who proposed the theory of evolution by natural selection, author of 'On the Origin of Species.'

name: 克里克
summary: 英国分子生物学家，与沃森共同发现了DNA的双螺旋结构，1962年诺贝尔奖得主。
summaryEn: British molecular biologist who co-discovered the double helix structure of DNA with Watson, 1962 Nobel laureate.
description: 英国分子生物学家，与沃森共同发现了DNA的双螺旋结构，1962年诺贝尔奖得主。
descriptionEn: British molecular biologist who co-discovered the double helix structure of DNA with Watson, 1962 Nobel laureate.

name: 沃森
summary: 美国分子生物学家，与克里克共同发现DNA双螺旋结构，开启了分子生物学时代。
summaryEn: American molecular biologist who co-discovered the DNA double helix structure with Crick, ushering in the era of molecular biology.
description: 美国分子生物学家，与克里克共同发现DNA双螺旋结构，开启了分子生物学时代。
descriptionEn: American molecular biologist who co-discovered the DNA double helix structure with Crick, ushering in the era of molecular biology.

name: 费曼
summary: 美国理论物理学家，量子电动力学的奠基人之一，以卓越的教学能力和费曼图闻名。
summaryEn: American theoretical physicist and co-founder of quantum electrodynamics, celebrated for his brilliant teaching and Feynman diagrams.
description: 美国理论物理学家，量子电动力学的奠基人之一，以卓越的教学能力和费曼图闻名。
descriptionEn: American theoretical physicist and co-founder of quantum electrodynamics, celebrated for his brilliant teaching and Feynman diagrams.

name: 霍金
summary: 英国理论物理学家和宇宙学家，在几乎全身瘫痪的情况下提出了霍金辐射理论，《时间简史》的作者。
summaryEn: British theoretical physicist and cosmologist who, despite near-total paralysis, proposed Hawking radiation theory and authored 'A Brief History of Time.'
description: 英国理论物理学家和宇宙学家，在几乎全身瘫痪的情况下提出了霍金辐射理论，《时间简史》的作者。
descriptionEn: British theoretical physicist and cosmologist who, despite near-total paralysis, proposed Hawking radiation theory and authored 'A Brief History of Time.'

name: 乔布斯
summary: 美国企业家，苹果公司的联合创始人和精神领袖，以iPhone和Mac等产品革命性地改变了个人计算。
summaryEn: American entrepreneur and co-founder/spiritual leader of Apple, who revolutionized personal computing with the Mac, iPhone, and other products.
description: 美国企业家，苹果公司的联合创始人和精神领袖，以iPhone和Mac等产品革命性地改变了个人计算。
descriptionEn: American entrepreneur and co-founder/spiritual leader of Apple, who revolutionized personal computing with the Mac, iPhone, and other products.

name: 比尔·盖茨
summary: 美国企业家，微软的联合创始人，长期位居世界首富，后转型为全球最大的慈善家之一。
summaryEn: American entrepreneur and Microsoft co-founder, long the world's richest person before becoming one of the world's largest philanthropists.
description: 美国企业家，微软的联合创始人，长期位居世界首富，后转型为全球最大的慈善家之一。
descriptionEn: American entrepreneur and Microsoft co-founder, long the world's richest person before becoming one of the world's largest philanthropists.

name: 居里夫人
summary: 波兰裔法国物理学家和化学家。放射性研究的先驱，发现钋和镭两种放射性元素，是世界上第一位两次获得诺贝尔奖的科学家（物理学奖和化学奖各一次）。
summaryEn: Polish-born French physicist-chemist and pioneer of radioactivity research, still the only person to win Nobel Prizes in two different sciences.
description: 波兰裔法国物理化学家，放射性研究的开创者，至今唯一在两门不同科学领域获诺贝尔奖的人。
descriptionEn: Polish-born French physicist-chemist and pioneer of radioactivity research, still the only person to win Nobel Prizes in two different sciences.

name: 南丁格尔
summary: 英国社会改革家和现代护理学的创始人，在克里米亚战争中极大改善了战地医院条件，以统计分析推动了医疗改革。
summaryEn: English social reformer and founder of modern nursing, who dramatically improved field hospital conditions in the Crimean War and used statistical analysis to advance healthcare reform.
description: 英国社会改革家和现代护理学的创始人，在克里米亚战争中极大改善了战地医院条件，以统计分析推动了医疗改革。
descriptionEn: English social reformer and founder of modern nursing, who dramatically improved field hospital conditions in the Crimean War and used statistical analysis to advance healthcare reform.

name: 简·奥斯汀
summary: 英国小说家，《傲慢与偏见》《理智与情感》等六部小说以细腻的社会观察和反讽著称。
summaryEn: English novelist whose six novels — including 'Pride and Prejudice' — are celebrated for their acute social observation and irony.
description: 英国小说家，《傲慢与偏见》《理智与情感》等六部小说以细腻的社会观察和反讽著称。
descriptionEn: English novelist whose six novels — including 'Pride and Prejudice' — are celebrated for their acute social observation and irony.

name: 秦始皇
summary: 中国历史上第一位皇帝（前221-前210年在位），姓嬴名政。灭六国、统一文字度量衡、修筑长城、建立中央集权制度，奠定了中国两千余年帝制的基本框架。
summaryEn: The first emperor of a unified China who established the first centralized empire, known for the Terracotta Army and the burning of books and burying of scholars.
description: 中国历史上第一位统一天下的皇帝，建立了中国第一个中央集权的帝国，以兵马俑和焚书坑儒闻名。
descriptionEn: The first emperor of a unified China who established the first centralized empire, known for the Terracotta Army and the burning of books and burying of scholars.

name: 卢蒙巴
summary: 刚果民主共和国首任总理和独立运动领袖，在冷战中被杀害，成为非洲反殖民斗争的象征。
summaryEn: First Prime Minister of the Democratic Republic of the Congo and independence leader, assassinated during the Cold War, becoming a symbol of African anti-colonial struggle.
description: 刚果民主共和国首任总理和独立运动领袖，在冷战中被杀害，成为非洲反殖民斗争的象征。
descriptionEn: First Prime Minister of the Democratic Republic of the Congo and independence leader, assassinated during the Cold War, becoming a symbol of African anti-colonial struggle.

name: 本·贝拉
summary: 阿尔及利亚独立后的首任总统，阿尔及利亚民族解放阵线的创始人之一。
summaryEn: Algeria's first president after independence and co-founder of the National Liberation Front.
description: 阿尔及利亚独立后的首任总统，阿尔及利亚民族解放阵线的创始人之一。
descriptionEn: Algeria's first president after independence and co-founder of the National Liberation Front.

name: 汉尼拔
summary: 迦太基最伟大的军事统帅，在第二次布匿战争中率军和大象翻越阿尔卑斯山，在坎尼战役中围歼罗马军团。
summaryEn: Carthage's greatest general who crossed the Alps with elephants in the Second Punic War and annihilated Roman legions at the Battle of Cannae.

summaryEn: Founder of the Yuan Dynasty who integrated the Mongol Empire into the Chinese dynastic system and hosted Marco Polo.

description: 日本电影导演，《七武士》和《罗生门》的创作者，在国际上获得了极高的声望。

name: 世宗大王

summaryEn: The fourth king of the Joseon Dynasty who created Hangul (the Korean alphabet), the most revered monarch in Korean history.

name: 申师任堂

summaryEn: Joseon-era woman artist and poet, celebrated as the ideal of virtuous womanhood and featured on Korean banknotes.

description: 韩国独立运动烈士，在日本殖民统治下组织了三一运动的学生示威，17岁在狱中殉国。

summaryEn: Indian poet, writer, and composer, author of 'Gitanjali,' first Asian to win the Nobel Prize in Literature in 1913.
description: 印度诗人、作家和作曲家，《吉檀迦利》的作者，1913年获诺贝尔文学奖，首位获此殊荣的亚洲人。

summaryEn: Hindu monk and philosopher who introduced Vedanta and yoga to the West, delivering his famous speech at the 1893 Parliament of World Religions in Chicago.

descriptionEn: Hindu monk and philosopher who introduced Vedanta and yoga to the West, delivering his famous speech at the 1893 Parliament of World Religions in Chicago.

name: 卡拉姆

name: 拉曼

description: 印度物理学家，因发现拉曼散射效应获1930年诺贝尔物理学奖，首位获此殊荣的亚洲科学家。

name: 波尔布特

summaryEn: Leader of the Communist Party of Kampuchea (Khmer Rouge), whose radical agrarian reforms caused the deaths of roughly a quarter of Cambodia's population.
description: 柬埔寨共产党（红色高棉）领袖，其激进农业改革导致了柬埔寨约四分之一人口的死亡。

name: 鲁米
summary: 波斯诗人和苏菲派神秘主义者，其灵性诗歌跨越了文化和宗教的界限，是美国最畅销的诗人之一。
summaryEn: Persian poet and Sufi mystic whose spiritual poetry transcends cultural and religious boundaries, one of the best-selling poets in America.

descriptionEn: Persian poet and Sufi mystic whose spiritual poetry transcends cultural and religious boundaries, one of the best-selling poets in America.

summaryEn: Arab scientist and father of optics, the first to correctly explain the principles of vision, whose scientific methodology foreshadowed modern experimental science.

summaryEn: Iranian Shiite leader and architect of the Islamic Revolution who established the Islamic Republic of Iran.

summaryEn: Russian short story writer and playwright, author of 'The Cherry Orchard' and 'Uncle Vanya,' a revolutionary of the modern short story.

name: 尼古拉·特斯拉

summaryEn: German composer who revolutionized opera with his 'music dramas'; 'The Ring of the Nibelung' is one of music history's most monumental works.

descriptionEn: German composer who revolutionized opera with his 'music dramas'; 'The Ring of the Nibelung' is one of music history's most monumental works.

name: 理查德·费曼

summaryEn: British theoretical physicist and author of 'A Brief History of Time,' who proposed Hawking radiation and pursued science for over 50 years with ALS.

name: 史蒂夫·乔布斯

summaryEn: American entrepreneur and Apple co-founder who profoundly transformed personal computing and mobile communication with the Mac, iPhone, and iPad.

name: 比尔·盖茨

summaryEn: American entrepreneur and Microsoft co-founder, long the world's richest person, later one of the world's largest philanthropists.

name: 马拉拉

summaryEn: Pakistani female education activist and the youngest Nobel Peace Prize laureate, who survived a Taliban assassination attempt at age 15.

name: 通贝里

summaryEn: Swedish climate activist who launched the 'Fridays for Future' global school strike movement, inspiring millions of young people to climate action.

name: 袁世凯

summaryEn: Creator of the Beiyang New Army in the late Qing, the first formal president of the Republic of China, who briefly and unsuccessfully declared himself emperor.
description: 清末北洋新军的缔造者，民国首任正式大总统，后短暂称帝失败。
descriptionEn: Creator of the Beiyang New Army in the late Qing, the first formal president of the Republic of China, who briefly and unsuccessfully declared himself emperor.

name: 周国平

description: 中国当代哲学家和作家，以关于人生、灵魂和孤独的哲学散文广受欢迎。
descriptionEn: Contemporary Chinese philosopher and writer, widely read for his philosophical essays on life, the soul, and solitude.

summaryEn: Chinese writer and author of 'Ordinary World,' celebrated for depicting the struggling spirit of rural youth during the early reform era.

descriptionEn: Chinese writer and author of 'Ordinary World,' celebrated for depicting the struggling spirit of rural youth during the early reform era.

name: 莫扎特
summary: 奥地利作曲家，古典主义时期最伟大的音乐天才之一。35岁短暂的一生创作了600余部作品，包括歌剧《费加罗的婚礼》《魔笛》和大量交响曲、协奏曲，旋律优美而深刻。
summaryEn: Austrian composer who, with prodigious genius, created over 600 works in 35 years spanning symphonies, operas, and chamber music.
description: 奥地利作曲家，以惊人的天才在35年生命中创作了600余部作品，涵盖交响曲、歌剧和室内乐。
descriptionEn: Austrian composer who, with prodigious genius, created over 600 works in 35 years spanning symphonies, operas, and chamber music.

name: 贝多芬
summary: 德国作曲家，连接古典主义与浪漫主义的音乐巨人。虽中年失聪仍坚持创作，创作了九部交响曲（包括《英雄》《命运》《合唱》）和32首钢琴奏鸣曲，将音乐表情推向前所未有的深度。
summaryEn: German composer who, while progressively going deaf, created the most revolutionary music of his era, pushing classical music to the threshold of Romanticism.
description: 德国作曲家，在逐渐失聪中创造了最具革命性的音乐，将古典音乐推向浪漫主义的门槛。
descriptionEn: German composer who, while progressively going deaf, created the most revolutionary music of his era, pushing classical music to the threshold of Romanticism.

name: 伦勃朗

descriptionEn: Spanish painter who transformed from court painter to a profound chronicler of war and human darkness, a pioneer of modern art.

name: 肖斯塔科维奇

summaryEn: Soviet composer who wrote 15 symphonies under Stalin's terror, using music to subtly encode resistance against the regime.

name: 卓别林

summaryEn: Eastern Jin painter and the first in Chinese art history with surviving works, celebrated for 'Admonitions of the Court Instructress' and the theory of 'conveying the spirit.'

name: 沈括
summary: 北宋科学家和政治家，《梦溪笔谈》的作者，被誉为'中国科学史上最卓越的人物'。
summaryEn: Northern Song scientist and statesman, author of 'Dream Pool Essays,' hailed as 'the most outstanding figure in the history of Chinese science.'
description: 北宋科学家和政治家，《梦溪笔谈》的作者，被誉为'中国科学史上最卓越的人物'。

name: 徐光启
summary: 明朝大臣和科学家，与利玛窦合作翻译《几何原本》，编纂《农政全书》，中国天主教'三柱石'之一。
summaryEn: Ming official and scientist who co-translated Euclid's 'Elements' with Matteo Ricci and compiled the 'Complete Treatise on Agriculture,' one of the 'Three Pillars of Chinese Catholicism.'

summary: 元末明初小说家，《三国演义》的作者，中国四大名著之一，将历史与文学完美融合。
summaryEn: Late Yuan-early Ming novelist and author of 'Romance of the Three Kingdoms,' one of China's Four Great Classics, masterfully blending history with literature.
description: 元末明初小说家，《三国演义》的作者，中国四大名著之一，将历史与文学完美融合。
descriptionEn: Late Yuan-early Ming novelist and author of 'Romance of the Three Kingdoms,' one of China's Four Great Classics, masterfully blending history with literature.

name: 紫式部
summary: 日本平安时代女作家，《源氏物语》的作者，创作了世界上公认的第一部长篇小说。
summaryEn: Heian-period Japanese woman writer and author of 'The Tale of Genji,' widely recognized as the world's first novel.
description: 日本平安时代女作家，《源氏物语》的作者，创作了世界上公认的第一部长篇小说。
descriptionEn: Heian-period Japanese woman writer and author of 'The Tale of Genji,' widely recognized as the world's first novel.

name: 葛饰北斋
summary: 日本浮世绘大师，《富岳三十六景》特别是《神奈川冲浪里》的创作者。
summaryEn: Japanese ukiyo-e master and creator of 'Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji,' particularly 'The Great Wave off Kanagawa.'
description: 日本浮世绘大师，《富岳三十六景》特别是《神奈川冲浪里》的创作者。
descriptionEn: Japanese ukiyo-e master and creator of 'Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji,' particularly 'The Great Wave off Kanagawa.'

name: 三岛由纪夫
summary: 日本作家，《金阁寺》和《丰饶之海》的作者，以极端的唯美主义和震撼性的自杀方式引起世界关注。
summaryEn: Japanese author of 'The Temple of the Golden Pavilion' and 'The Sea of Fertility,' who drew worldwide attention for his extreme aestheticism and shocking suicide.
description: 日本作家，《金阁寺》和《丰饶之海》的作者，以极端的唯美主义和震撼性的自杀方式引起世界关注。
descriptionEn: Japanese author of 'The Temple of the Golden Pavilion' and 'The Sea of Fertility,' who drew worldwide attention for his extreme aestheticism and shocking suicide.

name: 手冢治虫
summary: 日本漫画家和动画制作人，'漫画之神'，《铁臂阿童木》的创作者，奠定了现代日本动漫的基础。
summaryEn: Japanese manga artist and animator, the 'God of Manga,' creator of 'Astro Boy,' who laid the foundation for modern Japanese anime and manga.
description: 日本漫画家和动画制作人，'漫画之神'，《铁臂阿童木》的创作者，奠定了现代日本动漫的基础。
descriptionEn: Japanese manga artist and animator, the 'God of Manga,' creator of 'Astro Boy,' who laid the foundation for modern Japanese anime and manga.

name: 野口英世
summary: 日本细菌学家，在梅毒和狂犬病研究中做出了重要贡献，在非洲研究黄热病时感染去世。
summaryEn: Japanese bacteriologist who made significant contributions to syphilis and rabies research, died from yellow fever while researching in Africa.
description: 日本细菌学家，在梅毒和狂犬病研究中做出了重要贡献，在非洲研究黄热病时感染去世。
descriptionEn: Japanese bacteriologist who made significant contributions to syphilis and rabies research, died from yellow fever while researching in Africa.

name: 考底利耶
summary: 古印度政治家和哲学家，《政事论》的作者，帮助旃陀罗笈多建立了孔雀王朝。
summaryEn: Ancient Indian statesman and philosopher, author of the 'Arthashastra,' who helped Chandragupta establish the Maurya Empire.
description: 古印度政治家和哲学家，《政事论》的作者，帮助旃陀罗笈多建立了孔雀王朝。
descriptionEn: Ancient Indian statesman and philosopher, author of the 'Arthashastra,' who helped Chandragupta establish the Maurya Empire.

name: 安贝德卡
summary: 印度法学家和社会改革家，印度宪法的主要起草者，领导了不可接触者（达利特）的权利运动。
summaryEn: Indian jurist and social reformer, principal architect of India's constitution, who led the Dalit (untouchable) rights movement.
description: 印度法学家和社会改革家，印度宪法的主要起草者，领导了不可接触者（达利特）的权利运动。
descriptionEn: Indian jurist and social reformer, principal architect of India's constitution, who led the Dalit (untouchable) rights movement.

name: 特蕾莎修女
summary: 阿尔巴尼亚裔印度天主教修女，在加尔各答创办仁爱传教会，1979年获诺贝尔和平奖。
summaryEn: Albanian-Indian Catholic nun who founded the Missionaries of Charity in Kolkata, awarded the 1979 Nobel Peace Prize.
description: 阿尔巴尼亚裔印度天主教修女，在加尔各答创办仁爱传教会，1979年获诺贝尔和平奖。
descriptionEn: Albanian-Indian Catholic nun who founded the Missionaries of Charity in Kolkata, awarded the 1979 Nobel Peace Prize.

name: 伊本·西那
summary: 波斯博学家，《医典》的作者，被西方称为阿维森纳，其医学著作在欧洲被奉为标准教材达六百年。
summaryEn: Persian polymath and author of the 'Canon of Medicine,' known in the West as Avicenna; his medical text was the standard in Europe for six centuries.
description: 波斯博学家，《医典》的作者，被西方称为阿维森纳，其医学著作在欧洲被奉为标准教材达六百年。
descriptionEn: Persian polymath and author of the 'Canon of Medicine,' known in the West as Avicenna; his medical text was the standard in Europe for six centuries.

name: 伊本·鲁世德
summary: 安达卢西亚哲学家和法学家，亚里士多德最伟大的注释者，深刻影响了欧洲经院哲学。
summaryEn: Andalusian philosopher and jurist, Aristotle's greatest commentator, who profoundly influenced European scholasticism.
description: 安达卢西亚哲学家和法学家，亚里士多德最伟大的注释者，深刻影响了欧洲经院哲学。
descriptionEn: Andalusian philosopher and jurist, Aristotle's greatest commentator, who profoundly influenced European scholasticism.

name: 丢勒
summary: 德国文艺复兴画家和版画家，将意大利文艺复兴的理念引入北欧，以自画像和《启示录》版画著称。
summaryEn: German Renaissance painter and printmaker who brought Italian Renaissance ideas to Northern Europe, celebrated for self-portraits and the 'Apocalypse' woodcuts.
description: 德国文艺复兴画家和版画家，将意大利文艺复兴的理念引入北欧，以自画像和《启示录》版画著称。
descriptionEn: German Renaissance painter and printmaker who brought Italian Renaissance ideas to Northern Europe, celebrated for self-portraits and the 'Apocalypse' woodcuts.

name: 欧拉
summary: 瑞士数学家，历史上最高产的数学家之一，贡献覆盖了数学的几乎所有分支。
summaryEn: Swiss mathematician and one of history's most prolific, contributing to virtually every branch of mathematics.
description: 瑞士数学家，历史上最高产的数学家之一，贡献覆盖了数学的几乎所有分支。
descriptionEn: Swiss mathematician and one of history's most prolific, contributing to virtually every branch of mathematics.

name: 高斯
summary: 德国数学家，被尊为'数学王子'，在数论、统计学、天文学和物理学方面做出了奠基性的贡献。
summaryEn: German mathematician known as the 'Prince of Mathematics,' who made foundational contributions to number theory, statistics, astronomy, and physics.
description: 德国数学家，被尊为'数学王子'，在数论、统计学、天文学和物理学方面做出了奠基性的贡献。
descriptionEn: German mathematician known as the 'Prince of Mathematics,' who made foundational contributions to number theory, statistics, astronomy, and physics.

name: 道尔顿
summary: 英国化学家和物理学家，近代原子论的提出者，首次描述了色盲现象（道尔顿症）。
summaryEn: English chemist and physicist who proposed modern atomic theory and was the first to describe color blindness (Daltonism).
description: 英国化学家和物理学家，近代原子论的提出者，首次描述了色盲现象（道尔顿症）。
descriptionEn: English chemist and physicist who proposed modern atomic theory and was the first to describe color blindness (Daltonism).

name: 焦耳
summary: 英国物理学家，热力学第一定律的奠基人之一，能量的单位'焦耳'以他命名。
summaryEn: English physicist and co-founder of the first law of thermodynamics, after whom the unit of energy, the joule, is named.
description: 英国物理学家，热力学第一定律的奠基人之一，能量的单位'焦耳'以他命名。
descriptionEn: English physicist and co-founder of the first law of thermodynamics, after whom the unit of energy, the joule, is named.

name: 赫兹
summary: 德国物理学家，首次实验证实了电磁波的存在，频率单位'赫兹'以他命名。
summaryEn: German physicist who first experimentally confirmed the existence of electromagnetic waves; the unit of frequency, hertz, is named after him.
description: 德国物理学家，首次实验证实了电磁波的存在，频率单位'赫兹'以他命名。
descriptionEn: German physicist who first experimentally confirmed the existence of electromagnetic waves; the unit of frequency, hertz, is named after him.

name: 伦琴
summary: 德国物理学家，发现了X射线（伦琴射线），1901年获首届诺贝尔物理学奖。
summaryEn: German physicist who discovered X-rays (Rontgen rays) and won the first Nobel Prize in Physics in 1901.
description: 德国物理学家，发现了X射线（伦琴射线），1901年获首届诺贝尔物理学奖。
descriptionEn: German physicist who discovered X-rays (Rontgen rays) and won the first Nobel Prize in Physics in 1901.

name: 费米
summary: 意大利裔美国物理学家，建造了世界上第一座核反应堆，在理论和实验物理方面都做出了杰出贡献。
summaryEn: Italian-American physicist who built the world's first nuclear reactor, making outstanding contributions to both theoretical and experimental physics.
description: 意大利裔美国物理学家，建造了世界上第一座核反应堆，在理论和实验物理方面都做出了杰出贡献。
descriptionEn: Italian-American physicist who built the world's first nuclear reactor, making outstanding contributions to both theoretical and experimental physics.

name: 奥本海默
summary: 美国理论物理学家，曼哈顿计划的科学主管，'原子弹之父'，后因反对氢弹研发而受到安全审查。
summaryEn: American theoretical physicist and scientific director of the Manhattan Project, the 'father of the atomic bomb,' who later faced security hearings for opposing hydrogen bomb development.
description: 美国理论物理学家，曼哈顿计划的科学主管，'原子弹之父'，后因反对氢弹研发而受到安全审查。
descriptionEn: American theoretical physicist and scientific director of the Manhattan Project, the 'father of the atomic bomb,' who later faced security hearings for opposing hydrogen bomb development.

name: 凡·高
summary: 荷兰后印象派画家，生前仅售出一幅画，死后成为最著名的艺术家之一，以向日葵和星夜闻名。
summaryEn: Dutch Post-Impressionist painter who sold only one painting in his lifetime but became one of the world's most famous artists, celebrated for sunflowers and starry nights.
description: 荷兰后印象派画家，生前仅售出一幅画，死后成为最著名的艺术家之一，以向日葵和星夜闻名。
descriptionEn: Dutch Post-Impressionist painter who sold only one painting in his lifetime but became one of the world's most famous artists, celebrated for sunflowers and starry nights.

name: 达利
summary: 西班牙超现实主义画家，以《记忆的永恒》中融化的钟表和超乎寻常的想象力著称。
summaryEn: Spanish Surrealist painter celebrated for the melting clocks of 'The Persistence of Memory' and his extraordinary imagination.
description: 西班牙超现实主义画家，以《记忆的永恒》中融化的钟表和超乎寻常的想象力著称。
descriptionEn: Spanish Surrealist painter celebrated for the melting clocks of 'The Persistence of Memory' and his extraordinary imagination.

name: 亨德尔
summary: 德裔英国作曲家，以《弥赛亚》中的'哈利路亚'合唱享誉世界，巴洛克歌剧和清唱剧的大师。
summaryEn: German-born British composer world-renowned for the 'Hallelujah' chorus from 'Messiah,' a master of Baroque opera and oratorio.
description: 德裔英国作曲家，以《弥赛亚》中的'哈利路亚'合唱享誉世界，巴洛克歌剧和清唱剧的大师。
descriptionEn: German-born British composer world-renowned for the 'Hallelujah' chorus from 'Messiah,' a master of Baroque opera and oratorio.

name: 舒伯特
summary: 奥地利作曲家，艺术歌曲之王，在31年短暂生命中创作了600多首歌曲和众多交响曲。
summaryEn: Austrian composer and king of the art song (Lied), who created over 600 songs and numerous symphonies in just 31 years of life.
description: 奥地利作曲家，艺术歌曲之王，在31年短暂生命中创作了600多首歌曲和众多交响曲。
descriptionEn: Austrian composer and king of the art song (Lied), who created over 600 songs and numerous symphonies in just 31 years of life.

name: 德彪西
summary: 法国作曲家，印象派音乐的创始人，以《牧神午后前奏曲》和《大海》开创了全新的音乐色彩世界。
summaryEn: French composer and founder of musical Impressionism, who opened an entirely new world of musical color with 'Prelude to the Afternoon of a Faun' and 'La Mer.'
description: 法国作曲家，印象派音乐的创始人，以《牧神午后前奏曲》和《大海》开创了全新的音乐色彩世界。
descriptionEn: French composer and founder of musical Impressionism, who opened an entirely new world of musical color with 'Prelude to the Afternoon of a Faun' and 'La Mer.'

name: 拉赫玛尼诺夫
summary: 俄罗斯作曲家和钢琴家，20世纪最伟大的钢琴家之一，其第二钢琴协奏曲是浪漫主义音乐的巅峰。
summaryEn: Russian composer and pianist, one of the 20th century's greatest pianists, whose Second Piano Concerto is a summit of Romantic music.
description: 俄罗斯作曲家和钢琴家，20世纪最伟大的钢琴家之一，其第二钢琴协奏曲是浪漫主义音乐的巅峰。
descriptionEn: Russian composer and pianist, one of the 20th century's greatest pianists, whose Second Piano Concerto is a summit of Romantic music.

name: 高尔顿
summary: 英国博学家，现代统计学的奠基人之一，达尔文的表弟，指纹识别和人种改良学（优生学）的先驱。
summaryEn: English polymath and co-founder of modern statistics, Darwin's cousin, pioneer of fingerprint identification and eugenics.
description: 英国博学家，现代统计学的奠基人之一，达尔文的表弟，指纹识别和人种改良学（优生学）的先驱。
descriptionEn: English polymath and co-founder of modern statistics, Darwin's cousin, pioneer of fingerprint identification and eugenics.

name: 尼古拉·特斯拉
summary: 塞尔维亚裔美国发明家，交流电系统、特斯拉线圈的发明者，其天马行空的发明天才超前了时代。
summaryEn: Serbian-American inventor of the AC electrical system and Tesla coil, whose visionary inventive genius was far ahead of his time.
description: 塞尔维亚裔美国发明家，交流电系统、特斯拉线圈的发明者，其天马行空的发明天才超前了时代。
descriptionEn: Serbian-American inventor of the AC electrical system and Tesla coil, whose visionary inventive genius was far ahead of his time.

name: 皮埃尔·居里
summary: 法国物理学家，与妻子玛丽共同发现了放射性元素镭和钋，1903年诺贝尔物理学奖得主。
summaryEn: French physicist who co-discovered the radioactive elements radium and polonium with his wife Marie, 1903 Nobel laureate in Physics.
description: 法国物理学家，与妻子玛丽共同发现了放射性元素镭和钋，1903年诺贝尔物理学奖得主。
descriptionEn: French physicist who co-discovered the radioactive elements radium and polonium with his wife Marie, 1903 Nobel laureate in Physics.

name: 阿黛尔
summary: 英国创作型歌手，以《Rolling in the Deep》等歌曲成为21世纪最畅销的音乐艺人之一。
summaryEn: British singer-songwriter who became one of the 21st century's best-selling music artists with hits like 'Rolling in the Deep.'
description: 英国创作型歌手，以《Rolling in the Deep》等歌曲成为21世纪最畅销的音乐艺人之一。
descriptionEn: British singer-songwriter who became one of the 21st century's best-selling music artists with hits like 'Rolling in the Deep.'

name: 村上春树
summary: 日本作家，《挪威的森林》和《1Q84》的作者，作品被翻译成超过50种语言。
summaryEn: Japanese author of 'Norwegian Wood' and '1Q84,' whose works have been translated into over 50 languages.
description: 日本作家，《挪威的森林》和《1Q84》的作者，作品被翻译成超过50种语言。
descriptionEn: Japanese author of 'Norwegian Wood' and '1Q84,' whose works have been translated into over 50 languages.

name: J.K.罗琳
summary: 英国作家，哈利波特系列的作者，从靠救济金生活的单身母亲变成了全球最畅销的作家。
summaryEn: British author of the Harry Potter series, who went from a single mother on welfare to the world's best-selling author.
description: 英国作家，哈利波特系列的作者，从靠救济金生活的单身母亲变成了全球最畅销的作家。
descriptionEn: British author of the Harry Potter series, who went from a single mother on welfare to the world's best-selling author.

name: 戴安娜王妃
summary: 威尔士王妃，以其慈善工作——特别是推动禁止地雷和关爱艾滋病患者——和悲剧性的人生赢得了全世界的爱戴。
summaryEn: Princess of Wales who won the world's affection through her charity work — notably landmine bans and AIDS awareness — and her tragic life.
description: 威尔士王妃，以其慈善工作——特别是推动禁止地雷和关爱艾滋病患者——和悲剧性的人生赢得了全世界的爱戴。
descriptionEn: Princess of Wales who won the world's affection through her charity work — notably landmine bans and AIDS awareness — and her tragic life.

name: 若望保禄二世
summary: 波兰裔罗马天主教教宗，历史上任期第二长的教宗，在冷战结束和教会改革中发挥了重要作用。
summaryEn: Polish-born Pope of the Roman Catholic Church, the second-longest serving pope in history, who played a key role in the Cold War's end and church reform.
description: 波兰裔罗马天主教教宗，历史上任期第二长的教宗，在冷战结束和教会改革中发挥了重要作用。
descriptionEn: Polish-born Pope of the Roman Catholic Church, the second-longest serving pope in history, who played a key role in the Cold War's end and church reform.

name: 蕾切尔·卡逊
summary: 美国海洋生物学家和作家，《寂静的春天》的作者，现代环保运动的奠基人。
summaryEn: American marine biologist and writer, author of 'Silent Spring,' founder of the modern environmental movement.
description: 美国海洋生物学家和作家，《寂静的春天》的作者，现代环保运动的奠基人。
descriptionEn: American marine biologist and writer, author of 'Silent Spring,' founder of the modern environmental movement.

name: 简·古道尔
summary: 英国灵长类动物学家，以在坦桑尼亚对黑猩猩长达六十年的研究革新了人类对动物的认知。
summaryEn: British primatologist whose six-decade study of chimpanzees in Tanzania revolutionized human understanding of animal behavior.
description: 英国灵长类动物学家，以在坦桑尼亚对黑猩猩长达六十年的研究革新了人类对动物的认知。
descriptionEn: British primatologist whose six-decade study of chimpanzees in Tanzania revolutionized human understanding of animal behavior.

name: 阿姆斯特朗
summary: 美国宇航员，第一个踏上月球的人类，'这是一个人的一小步，却是人类的一大步。'
summaryEn: American astronaut and the first human to walk on the moon: 'That's one small step for man, one giant leap for mankind.'
description: 美国宇航员，第一个踏上月球的人类，'这是一个人的一小步，却是人类的一大步。'
descriptionEn: American astronaut and the first human to walk on the moon: 'That's one small step for man, one giant leap for mankind.'

name: 加加林
summary: 苏联宇航员，第一个进入太空的人类，1961年乘坐东方一号环绕地球。
summaryEn: Soviet cosmonaut and the first human in space, orbiting Earth in Vostok 1 in 1961.
description: 苏联宇航员，第一个进入太空的人类，1961年乘坐东方一号环绕地球。
descriptionEn: Soviet cosmonaut and the first human in space, orbiting Earth in Vostok 1 in 1961.

name: 爱因斯坦
summary: 德国出生的理论物理学家。1905年提出狭义相对论，1915年提出广义相对论，彻底改变了人类对时间、空间和引力的理解。1921年获诺贝尔物理学奖。
summaryEn: German-born physicist, creator of relativity theory, and the most iconic figure of 20th-century science, author of E=mc2.
description: 德裔物理学家，相对论的创立者，20世纪科学的最具标志性人物，E=mc2公式的作者。
descriptionEn: German-born physicist, creator of relativity theory, and the most iconic figure of 20th-century science, author of E=mc2.

name: 南森
summary: 挪威探险家和外交家，首次穿越格陵兰冰盖，后为难民事务做出了开创性贡献，获诺贝尔和平奖。
summaryEn: Norwegian explorer and diplomat, first to cross the Greenland ice cap, who later made pioneering contributions to refugee affairs, Nobel Peace Prize laureate.
description: 挪威探险家和外交家，首次穿越格陵兰冰盖，后为难民事务做出了开创性贡献，获诺贝尔和平奖。
descriptionEn: Norwegian explorer and diplomat, first to cross the Greenland ice cap, who later made pioneering contributions to refugee affairs, Nobel Peace Prize laureate.

name: 阿蒙森
summary: 挪威极地探险家，第一个到达南极点的人（1911年），还首次穿越了西北航道。
summaryEn: Norwegian polar explorer, the first person to reach the South Pole (1911), who also first navigated the Northwest Passage.
description: 挪威极地探险家，第一个到达南极点的人（1911年），还首次穿越了西北航道。
descriptionEn: Norwegian polar explorer, the first person to reach the South Pole (1911), who also first navigated the Northwest Passage.

name: 易卜生
summary: 挪威剧作家，'现代戏剧之父'，《玩偶之家》和《人民公敌》的作者。
summaryEn: Norwegian playwright and 'father of modern drama,' author of 'A Doll's House' and 'An Enemy of the People.'
description: 挪威剧作家，'现代戏剧之父'，《玩偶之家》和《人民公敌》的作者。
descriptionEn: Norwegian playwright and 'father of modern drama,' author of 'A Doll's House' and 'An Enemy of the People.'

name: 克尔凯郭尔
summary: 丹麦哲学家，存在主义哲学的先驱，以对焦虑、信仰和个人选择的存在性探索著称。
summaryEn: Danish philosopher and pioneer of existentialism, celebrated for his existential exploration of anxiety, faith, and individual choice.
description: 丹麦哲学家，存在主义哲学的先驱，以对焦虑、信仰和个人选择的存在性探索著称。
descriptionEn: Danish philosopher and pioneer of existentialism, celebrated for his existential exploration of anxiety, faith, and individual choice.

name: 哈勃
summary: 美国天文学家，证明了宇宙正在膨胀，发现星系的红移与距离成正比（哈勃定律）。
summaryEn: American astronomer who proved the universe is expanding, discovering that galaxies' redshift is proportional to their distance (Hubble's Law).
description: 美国天文学家，证明了宇宙正在膨胀，发现星系的红移与距离成正比（哈勃定律）。
descriptionEn: American astronomer who proved the universe is expanding, discovering that galaxies' redshift is proportional to their distance (Hubble's Law).

name: 冯·诺依曼
summary: 匈牙利裔美国数学家，对量子力学、博弈论和计算机架构（冯诺依曼架构）做出了奠基性贡献。
summaryEn: Hungarian-American mathematician who made foundational contributions to quantum mechanics, game theory, and computer architecture (von Neumann architecture).
description: 匈牙利裔美国数学家，对量子力学、博弈论和计算机架构（冯诺依曼架构）做出了奠基性贡献。
descriptionEn: Hungarian-American mathematician who made foundational contributions to quantum mechanics, game theory, and computer architecture (von Neumann architecture).

name: 罗莎·帕克斯
summary: 美国民权运动标志性人物，因拒绝在公交车上给白人让座，引发了蒙哥马利巴士抵制运动。
summaryEn: Iconic figure of the American civil rights movement whose refusal to give up her bus seat to a white passenger sparked the Montgomery Bus Boycott.
description: 美国民权运动标志性人物，因拒绝在公交车上给白人让座，引发了蒙哥马利巴士抵制运动。
descriptionEn: Iconic figure of the American civil rights movement whose refusal to give up her bus seat to a white passenger sparked the Montgomery Bus Boycott.

name: 图图大主教
summary: 南非圣公会大主教和反种族隔离运动领袖，真相与和解委员会主席。
summaryEn: South African Anglican Archbishop and anti-apartheid leader, chair of the Truth and Reconciliation Commission.
description: 南非圣公会大主教和反种族隔离运动领袖，真相与和解委员会主席。
descriptionEn: South African Anglican Archbishop and anti-apartheid leader, chair of the Truth and Reconciliation Commission.

name: 马拉拉
summary: 巴基斯坦女性教育活动家，最年轻的诺贝尔和平奖得主，为全球女童教育权利而奋斗。
summaryEn: Pakistani female education activist and the youngest Nobel Peace Prize laureate, fighting for girls' education rights worldwide.
description: 巴基斯坦女性教育活动家，最年轻的诺贝尔和平奖得主，为全球女童教育权利而奋斗。
descriptionEn: Pakistani female education activist and the youngest Nobel Peace Prize laureate, fighting for girls' education rights worldwide.

name: 迈特纳
summary: 奥地利-瑞典物理学家，与哈恩共同发现核裂变但诺贝尔奖只颁给了哈恩。
summaryEn: Austrian-Swedish physicist who co-discovered nuclear fission with Hahn, but the Nobel went to Hahn alone.
description: 奥地利-瑞典物理学家，与哈恩共同发现核裂变但诺贝尔奖只颁给了哈恩。
descriptionEn: Austrian-Swedish physicist who co-discovered nuclear fission with Hahn, but the Nobel went to Hahn alone.

name: 诺特
summary: 德国数学家，诺特定理揭示了对称性与守恒定律之间的深刻联系，被誉为最伟大的女数学家。
summaryEn: German mathematician whose Noether's Theorem revealed the profound link between symmetry and conservation laws.
description: 德国数学家，诺特定理揭示了对称性与守恒定律之间的深刻联系，被誉为最伟大的女数学家。
descriptionEn: German mathematician whose Noether's Theorem revealed the profound link between symmetry and conservation laws.

name: 希帕提娅
summary: 古埃及希腊裔女数学家、天文学家和哲学家，在古代世界最黑暗的时期守护了古典学问。
summaryEn: Ancient Egyptian-Greek woman mathematician, astronomer, and philosopher who preserved classical learning in antiquity's darkest period.
description: 古埃及希腊裔女数学家、天文学家和哲学家，在古代世界最黑暗的时期守护了古典学问。
descriptionEn: Ancient Egyptian-Greek woman mathematician, astronomer, and philosopher who preserved classical learning in antiquity's darkest period.

name: 巴贝奇
summary: 英国数学家，设计了差分机和分析机，被公认为计算机之父。
summaryEn: English mathematician who designed the Difference Engine and Analytical Engine, widely regarded as the father of computing.
description: 英国数学家，设计了差分机和分析机，被公认为计算机之父。
descriptionEn: English mathematician who designed the Difference Engine and Analytical Engine, widely regarded as the father of computing.

name: 普朗克
summary: 德国物理学家，量子理论的创始人，提出能量量子化的概念。
summaryEn: German physicist and originator of quantum theory, who introduced the concept of energy quantization.
description: 德国物理学家，量子理论的创始人，提出能量量子化的概念。
descriptionEn: German physicist and originator of quantum theory, who introduced the concept of energy quantization.

name: 玻尔
summary: 丹麦物理学家，量子力学的奠基人之一，提出了原子结构的玻尔模型。
summaryEn: Danish physicist and co-founder of quantum mechanics, who proposed the Bohr model of atomic structure.
description: 丹麦物理学家，量子力学的奠基人之一，提出了原子结构的玻尔模型。
descriptionEn: Danish physicist and co-founder of quantum mechanics, who proposed the Bohr model of atomic structure.

name: 狄拉克
summary: 英国理论物理学家，预言了反物质的存在，量子电动力学的先驱。
summaryEn: British theoretical physicist who predicted antimatter, a pioneer of quantum electrodynamics.
description: 英国理论物理学家，预言了反物质的存在，量子电动力学的先驱。
descriptionEn: British theoretical physicist who predicted antimatter, a pioneer of quantum electrodynamics.

name: 德布罗意
summary: 法国物理学家，提出物质波理论，揭示了所有物质具有波粒二象性。
summaryEn: French physicist who proposed matter wave theory, revealing that all matter exhibits wave-particle duality.
description: 法国物理学家，提出物质波理论，揭示了所有物质具有波粒二象性。
descriptionEn: French physicist who proposed matter wave theory, revealing that all matter exhibits wave-particle duality.

name: 泡利
summary: 奥地利物理学家，提出泡利不相容原理，预言了中微子的存在。
summaryEn: Austrian physicist who proposed the Pauli exclusion principle and predicted the existence of the neutrino.
description: 奥地利物理学家，提出泡利不相容原理，预言了中微子的存在。
descriptionEn: Austrian physicist who proposed the Pauli exclusion principle and predicted the existence of the neutrino.

name: 玻恩
summary: 德国物理学家，对量子力学的统计诠释做出了关键贡献。
summaryEn: German physicist who made crucial contributions to the statistical interpretation of quantum mechanics.
description: 德国物理学家，对量子力学的统计诠释做出了关键贡献。
descriptionEn: German physicist who made crucial contributions to the statistical interpretation of quantum mechanics.

name: 泰勒斯
summary: 古希腊哲学家和数学家，被认为是最早的西方哲学家，预测了公元前585年的日食。
summaryEn: Ancient Greek philosopher and mathematician, considered the first Western philosopher, who predicted a solar eclipse in 585 BCE.
description: 古希腊哲学家和数学家，被认为是最早的西方哲学家，预测了公元前585年的日食。
descriptionEn: Ancient Greek philosopher and mathematician, considered the first Western philosopher, who predicted a solar eclipse in 585 BCE.

name: 阿那克西曼德
summary: 古希腊哲学家，制作了最早的世界地图，提出宇宙起源于无定形的无限。
summaryEn: Ancient Greek philosopher who created the earliest world map and proposed the universe originated from the boundless.
description: 古希腊哲学家，制作了最早的世界地图，提出宇宙起源于无定形的无限。
descriptionEn: Ancient Greek philosopher who created the earliest world map and proposed the universe originated from the boundless.

name: 巴门尼德
summary: 古希腊哲学家，提出存在是一、不变和永恒的理论，深刻影响了柏拉图和西方形而上学。
summaryEn: Ancient Greek philosopher who argued being is one, unchanging, and eternal, profoundly influencing Plato and Western metaphysics.
description: 古希腊哲学家，提出存在是一、不变和永恒的理论，深刻影响了柏拉图和西方形而上学。
descriptionEn: Ancient Greek philosopher who argued being is one, unchanging, and eternal, profoundly influencing Plato and Western metaphysics.

name: 芝诺
summary: 古希腊哲学家，以阿喀琉斯与乌龟等著名悖论探讨了无限与运动的本质。
summaryEn: Ancient Greek philosopher who explored infinity and motion through famous paradoxes like Achilles and the tortoise.
description: 古希腊哲学家，以阿喀琉斯与乌龟等著名悖论探讨了无限与运动的本质。
descriptionEn: Ancient Greek philosopher who explored infinity and motion through famous paradoxes like Achilles and the tortoise.

name: 恩培多克勒
summary: 古希腊哲学家，提出四元素说（土、水、气、火），认为爱和斗争是宇宙的动力。
summaryEn: Ancient Greek philosopher who proposed the four-element theory (earth, water, air, fire) and held love and strife as cosmic forces.
description: 古希腊哲学家，提出四元素说（土、水、气、火），认为爱和斗争是宇宙的动力。
descriptionEn: Ancient Greek philosopher who proposed the four-element theory (earth, water, air, fire) and held love and strife as cosmic forces.

name: 普罗泰戈拉
summary: 古希腊智者，提出人是万物的尺度，是最早的相对主义者。
summaryEn: Ancient Greek sophist who declared man is the measure of all things, the earliest relativist.
description: 古希腊智者，提出人是万物的尺度，是最早的相对主义者。
descriptionEn: Ancient Greek sophist who declared man is the measure of all things, the earliest relativist.

name: 伊壁鸠鲁
summary: 古希腊哲学家，伊壁鸠鲁学派的创始人，主张通过追求心灵的宁静而非肉体享乐来获得幸福。
summaryEn: Ancient Greek philosopher and founder of Epicureanism, who advocated happiness through mental tranquility rather than physical pleasure.
description: 古希腊哲学家，伊壁鸠鲁学派的创始人，主张通过追求心灵的宁静而非肉体享乐来获得幸福。
descriptionEn: Ancient Greek philosopher and founder of Epicureanism, who advocated happiness through mental tranquility rather than physical pleasure.

name: 芝诺（斯多葛）
summary: 斯多葛学派的创始人，在雅典的彩绘柱廊下授徒，主张顺应自然和理性生活。
summaryEn: Founder of Stoicism, who taught at Athens' Painted Porch, advocating living in accordance with nature and reason.
description: 斯多葛学派的创始人，在雅典的彩绘柱廊下授徒，主张顺应自然和理性生活。
descriptionEn: Founder of Stoicism, who taught at Athens' Painted Porch, advocating living in accordance with nature and reason.

name: 卢克莱修
summary: 罗马诗人和哲学家，《物性论》以优美诗歌阐述了伊壁鸠鲁的原子论哲学。
summaryEn: Roman poet and philosopher whose On the Nature of Things expounded Epicurean atomism in beautiful verse.
description: 罗马诗人和哲学家，《物性论》以优美诗歌阐述了伊壁鸠鲁的原子论哲学。
descriptionEn: Roman poet and philosopher whose On the Nature of Things expounded Epicurean atomism in beautiful verse.

name: 波爱修斯
summary: 罗马哲学家，在狱中等待处决时写下《哲学的慰藉》，是中世纪最具影响力的哲学著作之一。
summaryEn: Roman philosopher who wrote The Consolation of Philosophy in prison awaiting execution, one of the Middle Ages' most influential philosophical works.
description: 罗马哲学家，在狱中等待处决时写下《哲学的慰藉》，是中世纪最具影响力的哲学著作之一。
descriptionEn: Roman philosopher who wrote The Consolation of Philosophy in prison awaiting execution, one of the Middle Ages' most influential philosophical works.

name: 邓斯·司各脱
summary: 中世纪苏格兰经院哲学家和神学家，精微博士，对自由意志和圣母无原罪说做出了重要贡献。
summaryEn: Medieval Scottish scholastic philosopher and theologian, the Subtle Doctor, who made key contributions on free will and the Immaculate Conception.
description: 中世纪苏格兰经院哲学家和神学家，精微博士，对自由意志和圣母无原罪说做出了重要贡献。
descriptionEn: Medieval Scottish scholastic philosopher and theologian, the Subtle Doctor, who made key contributions on free will and the Immaculate Conception.

name: 奥卡姆
summary: 英国方济各会哲学家，以奥卡姆剃刀原则闻名：如无必要，勿增实体。
summaryEn: English Franciscan philosopher famous for Ockham's Razor: entities should not be multiplied beyond necessity.
description: 英国方济各会哲学家，以奥卡姆剃刀原则闻名：如无必要，勿增实体。
descriptionEn: English Franciscan philosopher famous for Ockham's Razor: entities should not be multiplied beyond necessity.

name: 埃克哈特
summary: 德国神学家和神秘主义者，以关于灵魂与神合一的深刻论述著称。
summaryEn: German theologian and mystic celebrated for his profound teachings on the soul's union with God.
description: 德国神学家和神秘主义者，以关于灵魂与神合一的深刻论述著称。
descriptionEn: German theologian and mystic celebrated for his profound teachings on the soul's union with God.

name: 威克里夫
summary: 英国神学家，宗教改革的晨星，第一个将圣经全文翻译成英语的人。
summaryEn: English theologian and morning star of the Reformation, the first to translate the complete Bible into English.
description: 英国神学家，宗教改革的晨星，第一个将圣经全文翻译成英语的人。
descriptionEn: English theologian and morning star of the Reformation, the first to translate the complete Bible into English.

name: 胡斯
summary: 捷克宗教改革家，因批评天主教会而被康斯坦茨公会议判处火刑处死。
summaryEn: Czech religious reformer burned at the stake by the Council of Constance for criticizing the Catholic Church.
description: 捷克宗教改革家，因批评天主教会而被康斯坦茨公会议判处火刑处死。
descriptionEn: Czech religious reformer burned at the stake by the Council of Constance for criticizing the Catholic Church.

name: 彼特拉克
summary: 意大利学者和诗人，文艺复兴人文主义之父，以其献给劳拉的十四行诗闻名。
summaryEn: Italian scholar and poet, father of Renaissance humanism, celebrated for his sonnets to Laura.
description: 意大利学者和诗人，文艺复兴人文主义之父，以其献给劳拉的十四行诗闻名。
descriptionEn: Italian scholar and poet, father of Renaissance humanism, celebrated for his sonnets to Laura.

name: 薄伽丘
summary: 意大利作家，《十日谈》的作者，与但丁、彼特拉克并称意大利文学三杰。
summaryEn: Italian writer and author of The Decameron, alongside Dante and Petrarch as one of Italy's three literary crowns.
description: 意大利作家，《十日谈》的作者，与但丁、彼特拉克并称意大利文学三杰。
descriptionEn: Italian writer and author of The Decameron, alongside Dante and Petrarch as one of Italy's three literary crowns.

name: 埃尔·格列柯
summary: 希腊裔西班牙画家，以修长的人体和强烈的宗教情感为特征的表现主义先驱。
summaryEn: Greek-Spanish painter and precursor of Expressionism, characterized by elongated figures and intense religious emotion.
description: 希腊裔西班牙画家，以修长的人体和强烈的宗教情感为特征的表现主义先驱。
descriptionEn: Greek-Spanish painter and precursor of Expressionism, characterized by elongated figures and intense religious emotion.

name: 凡·艾克
summary: 尼德兰画家，油画的完善者，《根特祭坛画》的创作者。
summaryEn: Netherlandish painter who perfected oil painting technique, creator of the Ghent Altarpiece.
description: 尼德兰画家，油画的完善者，《根特祭坛画》的创作者。
descriptionEn: Netherlandish painter who perfected oil painting technique, creator of the Ghent Altarpiece.

name: 勃鲁盖尔
summary: 尼德兰文艺复兴画家，以描绘农民生活和风景著称，《巴别塔》是其代表作。
summaryEn: Netherlandish Renaissance painter celebrated for peasant scenes and landscapes, with The Tower of Babel as his masterpiece.
description: 尼德兰文艺复兴画家，以描绘农民生活和风景著称，《巴别塔》是其代表作。
descriptionEn: Netherlandish Renaissance painter celebrated for peasant scenes and landscapes, with The Tower of Babel as his masterpiece.

name: 贝尼尼
summary: 意大利巴洛克雕塑家和建筑师，圣彼得广场和《圣特蕾莎的狂喜》的创作者。
summaryEn: Italian Baroque sculptor and architect, creator of St. Peter's Square and The Ecstasy of Saint Teresa.
description: 意大利巴洛克雕塑家和建筑师，圣彼得广场和《圣特蕾莎的狂喜》的创作者。
descriptionEn: Italian Baroque sculptor and architect, creator of St. Peter's Square and The Ecstasy of Saint Teresa.

name: 鲁本斯
summary: 佛兰德斯巴洛克画家，以丰满的人体和宗教神话题材的宏大场景著称。
summaryEn: Flemish Baroque painter celebrated for voluptuous figures and grand mythological and religious scenes.
description: 佛兰德斯巴洛克画家，以丰满的人体和宗教神话题材的宏大场景著称。
descriptionEn: Flemish Baroque painter celebrated for voluptuous figures and grand mythological and religious scenes.

name: 委拉斯开兹
summary: 西班牙巴洛克画家，《宫娥》的创作者，被誉为画家中的画家。
summaryEn: Spanish Baroque painter and creator of Las Meninas, hailed as the painter of painters.
description: 西班牙巴洛克画家，《宫娥》的创作者，被誉为画家中的画家。
descriptionEn: Spanish Baroque painter and creator of Las Meninas, hailed as the painter of painters.

name: 提香
summary: 意大利威尼斯画派最伟大的画家，以对色彩的革新性运用和对人物心理的深刻描绘著称。
summaryEn: The greatest painter of the Venetian school, celebrated for his revolutionary use of color and profound psychological portraiture.
description: 意大利威尼斯画派最伟大的画家，以对色彩的革新性运用和对人物心理的深刻描绘著称。
descriptionEn: The greatest painter of the Venetian school, celebrated for his revolutionary use of color and profound psychological portraiture.

name: 波提切利
summary: 意大利文艺复兴画家，《春》和《维纳斯的诞生》是最具代表性的文艺复兴作品之一。
summaryEn: Italian Renaissance painter whose Primavera and The Birth of Venus are among the most iconic Renaissance works.
description: 意大利文艺复兴画家，《春》和《维纳斯的诞生》是最具代表性的文艺复兴作品之一。
descriptionEn: Italian Renaissance painter whose Primavera and The Birth of Venus are among the most iconic Renaissance works.

name: 乔托
summary: 意大利画家和建筑师，被认为是最早摆脱拜占庭僵化风格、开创文艺复兴绘画的艺术家。
summaryEn: Italian painter and architect, considered the first to break from Byzantine rigidity and pioneer Renaissance painting.
description: 意大利画家和建筑师，被认为是最早摆脱拜占庭僵化风格、开创文艺复兴绘画的艺术家。
descriptionEn: Italian painter and architect, considered the first to break from Byzantine rigidity and pioneer Renaissance painting.

name: 马萨乔
summary: 意大利文艺复兴画家，最早系统地运用透视法，在27岁早逝前已改变了绘画的面貌。
summaryEn: Italian Renaissance painter and the first to systematically use perspective, who transformed painting before his early death at 27.
description: 意大利文艺复兴画家，最早系统地运用透视法，在27岁早逝前已改变了绘画的面貌。
descriptionEn: Italian Renaissance painter and the first to systematically use perspective, who transformed painting before his early death at 27.

name: 皮耶罗·德拉·弗朗切斯卡
summary: 意大利文艺复兴画家和数学家，以对几何透视的精确运用和宁静庄严的风格著称。
